opening_line: Mister operator, wanna play hide and seek? I'm hiding on every floor. You're it.
notes_for_player: Vocal analysis: synthetic child profile. Figure on CAM moves at wrong height.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Behind you. In the walls. On the stairs. Guess.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: Red coat. Like the other one. You'll see me when you lose.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: We started when you sat down. You didn't hear the rules?

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Look at the monitor. I'm waving. Why aren't you waving back?
